📥 Seed MAIN Sheet Data ONE-TIME SETUP — DO NOT USE
Pushes hardcoded (stale) bookings to Supabase. Use 🗓 June Main & Venue Sync above to sync live data from the sheet.
Status: Disabled — data already seeded. Use Venue Sync instead.
▶ 378 booking entries from June 2026 MAIN sheet ready to push
🗓 June Main & Venue Sync
Reads each venue tab from the June Main & Venue sheet, detects bookings / TBF / TBC / Cancelled. Writes to Supabase and reloads all calendars. Run this whenever you update the sheet.
Status: Ready
▶ Click "Scan Venue Tabs" to pull the latest bookings, TBF and TBC from the sheet.

R>100 G<30 R>2×G → UNAVAILABLE
Cardinal
R>150 G<50 B<70 → UNAVAILABLE

02

About

Tuneholic Entertainment is Maharashtra's leading artist management company — a true one-stop solution for talent across every genre and scale. From intimate local venues to massive festival stages, we have powered over 25,000 gigs across Mumbai, Pune, Nashik, Aurangabad, and beyond.

We handle everything an artist needs under one roof: booking, branding, contracts, press, social media, touring logistics, and sponsorship deals. Our team works so artists never have to worry about the business — they just focus on the art.

Whether you are an emerging act looking for your first break or an established name ready to scale, Tuneholic Entertainment brings the network, the expertise, and the passion to take your career to the next level across Maharashtra and India.

25K+ Gigs Across Maharashtra
500+ Artists Managed
15+ Years in the Industry
